meaning: n.司仪神父,天主教主领弥撒的神父
examples: Celebrant: Let us lift up our hearts!
Festvial are meant to celebrant important times of year.
If there is only one deacon, he takes his place at the right of the celebrant.
And our first celebrant today is Reverend Dr. Cynthia Hale, who will deliver our opening prayer.
Sometimes the words are difficult to understand or are prayed in flat and boring tones as though the celebrant doesn't believe them.
